transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Have you finished collecting sources for your research paper?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Almost. I just need two more journal articles from the library database.

choices.text: She has not started her research.
She needs a few more sources.
She has already submitted the paper.
She cannot access the library database.

questions.explanation: She says she only needs two more journal articles to complete her research.
questions.evidence: I just need two more journal articles from the library database.
